title: Thomas Paine and the Words That Marched
author: Roughdraft Stories
description: Thomas Paine reached America just before the Revolution and quickly became one of its loudest and clearest voices. This factual narrative follows Common Sense, the Crisis papers, and the strange career of a writer who could move armies with a pamphlet.

chapters.title: An Englishman Arrives in a Troubled America
Common Sense and the Break with Britain
The Crisis Papers and a Fading Army
A Pen Too Sharp for Comfort
